# Protocol boundary fixtures

Boundary fixtures are valid at-limit inputs for the gate-9 harness: each one sits exactly at
a frozen decoder cap from `limits.json` and must be accepted, in contrast to the sibling
`negative/` fixtures, which sit one step past a cap and must be rejected. `source-count-at-limit.json`
carries the maximum 4,096 sources per batch. These files are generated by
`scripts/generate_protocol_negatives.py` and, being legitimate inputs, carry a trailing newline.
